title: How to Prepare Your Child for a Lab Test: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
ort shouldn't last very long. You may need to hold your child if they are younger to provide comfort and keep them from moving.
Is there anything else I should know about preparing my child for a lab test? 
If you have questions or concerns about testing or if your child has special needs, talk to your child's provider. You can work together to discuss the best way to prepare and comfort your child throughout the testing process.
Learn more about laboratory tests, reference ranges, and understanding results .
